title: CodeGrind: UI polish meets AI assist enhancements
summary: Highlighting recent UI refinements alongside upgraded AI assistant capabilities to boost coding practice and problem-solving workflows.
core_message: CodeGrind now blends a smoother UI with enhanced AI-assisted problem solving, enabling faster context switching, clearer feedback, and a more engaging learning loop for DS&A practice.
cta: Try the updated UI and AI helper in your next practice session on CodeGrind.
visual_brief: Static, clean screenshot-style image showing the CodeGrind code editor with AI chat panel and updated UI elements (neon cyberpunk accents, clear problem pane, responsive layout). Include subtle indicators of AI guidance and problem-solving workflow.

media.selection_reason: No public blob assets were available, so the workflow will generate a review image from the brief.
